name: Chocolate Refrigerator Dessert
recipeInstructions:
CRUST - Pat half the graham cracker crumbs in the bottom of a 9x13 pan. Bake at 300°F for 6 minutes.
FILLING - Cream together butter and powdered sugar until smooth. Add egg yolks, vanilla, and melted chocolate. Fold in beaten egg whites. Spread half of this mixture over the crust.
Remove ice cream from freezer about 10 minutes before serving. Slice into 1/2 to 3/4 inch slices and spread each slice with the remaining filling. Top with graham cracker crumbs. Store in the freezer for several hours or overnight. The dessert can be made up to two days ahead of time.
